objective: Remove interaction edge scrolling from drag, resize, and group interactions while preserving normal scrolling and committed in-viewport outcomes.

role_justifications.worker: Removed the feature from product code, tests, perf harness, and docs.
role_justifications.critic: Checked for dangling auto-scroll logic, stale tests, and behavioral risks.
role_justifications.acceptance_gate: Independently verified e2e, repeat canaries, perf removal, dead-code proof, and verdict.
role_justifications.planner: Mapped deletion scope and gates before source edits.
role_justifications.conductor: Selected the smallest core MAW roster and enforced delegation proof and acceptance gates.

acceptance_criteria: removed interaction auto-scroll entry point and call sites
perf harness no longer runs the removed scenario
active-source grep clean for removed symbols
normal page scrolling and overflow-anchor stabilization not removed
